title: aglaia edulis
intro: Aglaia edulis, also known as the edible aglaia or kaffir plum, is a plant species that belongs to the Meliaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its fruit, which is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aglaia edulis include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Aglaia edulis is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
